_doc: Config-driven instrument universes for the event engine. Each catalogue event names the universe(s) it needs. scripts/fetch_history.js fetches the union of tickers referenced by the active catalogue plus any universe listed here. Add instruments as events require them — start focused, grow deliberately.

core._doc: Initial focused cross-asset set. Liquid ETFs, all daily-available via Yahoo v8. The bootstrap universe; grow as events require.

china._doc: US-listed China/HK ETFs spanning A-shares, offshore large-cap and internet/tech — the breadth basket for the China recovery study. Yahoo-fetched. A SEGMENT-level proxy for Chinese-equity participation, NOT Hang Seng constituents (we hold no HK equities). Coarse (~11 items) and USD-denominated; honest caveats carried on the card.

global_etf._doc: Single-country / regional equity ETFs for SentimenTrader-style cross-sectional breadth studies. NORGATE-FED and survivorship-free: delisted ETFs are included via the delisted database (e.g. RSX-202212, Russia, delisted 2022) and membership is point-in-time (a name counts only on sessions it actually traded). Benchmark/target: SPY. NOT used by the Yahoo Node pipeline — consumed by the Python breadth engine (scripts/etf_breadth_engine.py). History from 1996 (iShares EWx series).

planned._doc: Not yet wired — added when an event needs them.
planned.japan_sectors: TOPIX-17 Tokyo-listed sector ETFs 1617.T..1633.T (Japan internal-breadth; scope in private/)
planned.futures: DATA-GATED — continuous futures require a Norgate feed; Yahoo unreliable. Do not fake.
